description: Universal structured effects for card resolution. Numeric fields are counts unless noted. Null/false = inactive.

field_notes.gain_coins: Coins gained when this card resolves.
field_notes.gain_vp: Victory points gained immediately on resolve.
field_notes.gain_valor: Temporary or permanent valor bonus from effect (not printed card valor).
field_notes.destroy_from: Allowed source zones for destroy, e.g. hand, discard, play_area.
field_notes.gain_card: Slug or id of a specific card gained.
field_notes.gain_item: Slug or id of item placed in play.
field_notes.arena_bonus_valor: Bonus valor for current arena attempt.
field_notes.look_at_top_cards: Number of top deck cards to look at.
field_notes.reorder_top_cards: May reorder cards looked at on top of deck.
field_notes.place_card_on_deck: Card reference placed on top/bottom of deck.
field_notes.counts_as_faction: Faction name this card counts as for banding.
field_notes.next_card_to_hand: Next purchased/gained card goes to hand instead of discard.
field_notes.discount_epics: Coins discount on epic purchases this turn.
field_notes.force_opponent_discard: Each opponent discards this many cards.
field_notes.gain_banding_bonus: Faction whose banding bonus is triggered.
